response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software engineering experience and genuine affinity for developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD setup, AI/MCP tooling, workshops on testing). However, the resume shows no explicit people-management or team-leadership role, which is the core requirement of this Level II Manager position. Mobile-platform exposure is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work years ago). Worth a screening call to probe leadership scope at re:cinq and Optilyz, but on paper this reads as a senior IC, not an engineering manager.
strengths: Deep software craftsmanship background with strong testing/TDD focus and authored test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Hands-on experience with developer tooling, CI/CD setup, and emerging AI-agent/MCP infrastructure
Long track record of community building via workshops, courses, and talks (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, FOSS4G)
concerns: No explicit people-management or team-lead role; minimum 2 years management requirement appears unmet
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem experience relative to the role's focus
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap
